data.name: WITCH ACADEMY H
data.detailed_description:
Witch Academy H is a hentai game where you discover the life of a girl reborn in a world of magic and fantasy.
Study at a school of witchcraft while meeting different girls and having sex with them.
Unlock all the porn scenes that this game has in store for you.
data.about_the_game:
Witch Academy H is a hentai game where you discover the life of a girl reborn in a world of magic and fantasy.
Study at a school of witchcraft while meeting different girls and having sex with them.
Unlock all the porn scenes that this game has in store for you.
data.short_description: Witch Academy H, is an adventure style visual novel with different lesbian and non-lesbian girls that you have to fuck.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: A partir del 1 de enero de 2024, el cliente de Steam solo será compatible con Windows 10 y versiones posteriores.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: A partir del 1 de enero de 2024, el cliente de Steam solo será compatible con Windows 10 y versiones posteriores.
